q: Did you have any hobbies when you were a child?
examiner_note: Giám khảo muốn kiểm tra khả năng sử dụng các cấu trúc nói về quá khứ như 'used to', 'would', và 'be into something'. Hãy chuẩn bị một danh sách các trò chơi hoặc hoạt động phổ biến của trẻ em (ví dụ: hide and seek, playing with dolls/LEGO). Đừng quên mô tả cảm xúc khi đó để câu trả lời thêm sinh động.

band7.text: Yes, I had quite a few. I used to spend most of my afternoons playing hide-and-seek with the neighborhood kids. I also loved drawing; I’d sit for hours with my crayons trying to sketch everything I saw in the house.
band7.note: Sử dụng đúng cấu trúc 'used to' và 'would' để nói về thói quen trong quá khứ.

band8.text: Oh, definitely. My childhood was quite active. I was really into collectable cards for a while—we’d trade them at school during recess. Apart from that, I was quite fond of building LEGO sets. It was my favorite way to spend a rainy afternoon indoors. Those hobbies really helped spark my creativity when I was young.
band8.note: Cấu trúc câu tự nhiên, sử dụng các cụm từ như 'really into', 'recess', 'fond of', 'spark my creativity'.

band9.text: Looking back, I was an exceptionally imaginative child with a diverse range of interests. I was particularly enamored with role-playing games and would frequently orchestrate elaborate pretend scenarios with my friends. Additionally, I developed a transitory fascination with stamp collecting, which, although short-lived, ignited a curiosity about different cultures and geographies. These early pursuits were fundamental in shaping my inquisitive nature.
band9.note: Sử dụng từ vựng cực kỳ cao cấp (enamored, orchestrate, elaborate, transitory, inquisitive). Cách diễn đạt mang tính phản tư và phân tích cao.

v.example: I used to play with dolls when I was a child.

v.meaning: thường (hành động lặp lại trong quá khứ)
v.example: Every summer, we would go to the beach.
I played football with the neighborhood kids every evening.
We used to trade stickers during recess.
I was really into comic books as a kid.
I was very fond of my grandmother's stories.
DIY projects help spark creativity in children.
She was a very imaginative child who loved making up stories.
I was enamored with the idea of being a space traveler.
The kids managed to orchestrate a small play for their parents.
They built an elaborate fort out of cushions and blankets.
Kids love acting out pretend scenarios like playing house.
Most childhood obsessions are transitory.
A simple telescope can ignite a child's curiosity about space.
Her early pursuits in music led to a professional career.
Education plays a big role in shaping a person's nature.
Children are naturally inquisitive about the world around them.
Hide-and-seek is a classic childhood game.

v.meaning: những thứ có thể sưu tầm
v.example: Stamps and coins are common collectibles.
I preferred playing indoors on rainy days.
The boys spent all day playing outdoors.
We used to play tag until the sun went down.
Hopscotch was a favorite at the playground.
I had a huge collection of glass marbles.
We used to play blind man's buff in the backyard.
Monopoly is one of the most famous board games.
Our family always played card games after dinner.
I used to spend all my allowance on Marvel comics.
Her notebooks were full of colorful doodles.
My little sister loves to play house with her bear.
We organized a scavenger hunt for the birthday party.
My grandfather was a master of storytelling.
I used to daydream about flying to the moon.
The book is full of whimsical characters.
The mischievous little boy hid his sister's doll.
I miss the carefree days of my childhood.
Life was much more uncomplicated back then.
Children seem to have boundless energy.
She was toying with her necklace while she spoke.
Reading was my favorite way to pass the time.
When I look back, I realize how lucky I was.

v.meaning: những kỷ niệm đáng trân trọng
v.example: Our childhood trips are among my most cherished memories.

v.meaning: trí tưởng tượng cực kỳ sống động
v.example: He has a vivid imagination and writes wonderful stories.
Climbing that tree used to be a breeze for me.

v.word: at the drop of a hat
v.example: We would start playing tag at the drop of a hat.

v.word: get into the swing of things
v.meaning: bắt đầu quen với cái gì đó
v.example: It took a while to get into the swing of school life.
My dad taught me to learn the ropes of fishing.
The older kids had to keep an eye on the younger ones.
Children live in a world of make believe.
I have a strong fondness for my old hometown.
